ddls:
CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the statistic */,
  "reference_id" TEXT /* ID of the conglomerate for which the statistic was created */,
  "table_id" TEXT /* ID of the table from which the information is collected */,
  "creation_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp indicating when this statistic was created or last updated */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of statistic (e.g., A for Average, S for Sum) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User ID of the user who last updated the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_table_id FOREIGN KEY ("table_id") REFERENCES tables ("table_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_reference_id FOREIGN KEY ("reference_id") REFERENCES conglomerates ("conglomerate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conglomerates" (
  "conglomerate_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each conglomerate */,
  "conglomerate_name" TEXT /* Name of the conglomerate */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry in which the conglomerate operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for further inquiries */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the conglomerate */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the conglomerate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conglomerate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tables" (
  "table_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the table */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table */,
  "table_description" TEXT /* Description of the table's data */,
  "schema" TEXT /* Schema of the table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("table_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst, viewer) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "stat_id" TEXT /* ID of the statistic being accessed */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the statistic */,
  "access_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the statistic was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the statistic was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "stat_id" TEXT /* ID of the statistic for which the alert is set */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user who created the alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., in-app, email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "stat_id" TEXT /* ID of the statistic being tracked */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the statistic */,
  "update_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when this version was created */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Description of permissions granted to this role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistic_types" (
  "type_code" TEXT /* Unique code for each statistic type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the statistic type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user receiving the notification */,
  "message" TEXT /* Notification message */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the notification was sent */,
  "read_status" INTEGER /* Status of the notification (read/unread) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "templates" (
  "template_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each template */,
  "template_name" TEXT /* Name of the template */,
  "template_content" TEXT /* Content format of the template */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "stat_id" TEXT /* ID of the statistic used to generate the report */,
  "template_id" INTEGER /* ID of the template used for the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_template_id FOREIGN KEY ("template_id") REFERENCES templates ("template_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytical_models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytical model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the analytical model */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Description of the analytical model */,
  "model_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters of the analytical model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the analytical model used for the prediction */,
  "stat_id" TEXT /* ID of the statistic used for the prediction */,
  "prediction_value" REAL /* Value of the prediction */,
  "prediction_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the prediction was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES analytical_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id")
)
